TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_J_Grant_Albrecht, title = J_Grant_Albrecht, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/J_Grant_Albrecht} }

S.FORM: J. Grant Albrecht kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 5, J. Grant Albrecht, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

S.PHON: *. ɣrant alβreʦ~ʨħt kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *. ɣrant alβreʦ~ʨħt, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
